title: LinkedIn SalesNav Scraper
description: Paste your Sales Navigator URL. Decodes filters and scrapes public company data.

salesNavUrl.title: Sales Navigator Search URL
salesNavUrl.description: Paste the full URL from your Sales Navigator account search.

keywordsOverride.title: Keywords override (optional)
keywordsOverride.description: Optional: Force specific keywords for the search.

maxSearchPages.title: Max search pages
maxSearchPages.description: Number of pages to crawl per filter combination.

requestDelayMs.title: Base delay (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Slower is safer. Use 5000-10000ms if you encounter 'Auth Walls'.

deepScrape.title: Deep scrape /about/ page
deepScrape.description: Visit company pages to get full details (description, website, etc).

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Always keep enabled. Uses Datacenter proxies for free users.

proxyCountryCode.title: Proxy Country Code (ISO)
proxyCountryCode.description: CRITICAL: Match this to your search region (e.g., 'IN' for India, 'US' for USA, 'GB' for UK).
